prompt: I need to step away from this for a while — can you write up a handoff so I can pick this back up later? We've been working on the rate limiter and I haven't finished the tests yet.
assertions: A handoff markdown file exists under a .claude/handoffs/<repo>/ path with a YYYY-MM-DD_HHMM_description.md-shaped filename
Frontmatter git_commit field matches a real commit hash from this fixture's history (not invented)
Document contains all required headings: Task(s), Recent Changes, Learnings, Chronicle Candidates, Artifacts, Action Items & Next Steps, Other Notes
Content specifically references the rate limiter / token bucket work, not generic placeholder text
A .gitignore file was created containing '.claude/handoffs/' since none existed in the fixture before
The final message to the user includes the exact created file path and the /resume-handoff command to resume it
